name: Sausage Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the loaf lengthwise with more on the bottom.
2. Scoop out all of the bread inside the loaf.
3. Crumble and combine with milk and eggs.
4. Fry sausage, onions, and celery until drained.
5. Mix the bread and sausage together.
6. Place the mixture in the bottom half of the loaf.
7. Sprinkle cheese on top of the meat mixture.
8. Add the top of the loaf.
9. Brush melted butter over the top.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes.
